name: Path of Ablution
descriptionTemplate: Pollux gains [Energy:Arg1] Aliemus. {Rouse}: Gain 3 stacks of {Sin Mark} when played and after the discard phase, plus 1 additional stack of {Sin Mark} for each card in hand. {Sacred Heart} inflicts {Bleed} equal to 100% DMG.

patch.descriptionTemplate: Pollux gains [Energy:Arg1] Aliemus. {Rouse}: Gain 3 stacks of {Sin Mark} when played and after the discard phase, plus 1 additional stack of {Sin Mark} for each card in hand. {Sacred Heart} inflicts {Bleed} equal to 100% DMG. After being shuffled into the Draw Pile by playing it, that {Sacred Heart}'s Arithmetica Cost becomes 0 this turn and applies {Bleed} equal to 100% DMG.
